args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%' AND gyldigtil IS NULL
LIMIT 1;
